title: Enrollment Confirmation Screen — Displayed Immediately After Successful Submission
description: After successful enrollment submission, the system shall display a confirmation screen. The screen includes the enrollment confirmation number, submission date, coverage effective date, current status, and primary action buttons.

screenContent.heading: ✓ Enrollment Submitted Successfully
screenContent.body: Your 2027 benefits enrollment has been submitted.

title: Enrollment Confirmation Number — Unique Reference ID Searchable by Employee and Admin
description: The system shall generate a unique enrollment confirmation number at submission time. Both the employee and administrator shall be able to search or look up an enrollment using this number.

title: Election Summary on Confirmation Screen — Plan, Coverage, Cost, and Totals
description: The confirmation screen shall display a summary table of all submitted elections with plan, coverage tier, and employee cost per benefit. Total monthly and biweekly costs are shown. Calculation uses the same Premium Calculation Engine used by payroll.

title: Enrollment Status Lifecycle — Shared State Machine Across Employee Portal, Carrier, Payroll, and Notifications
description: The system shall track enrollment status through a defined lifecycle after submission. This state machine is the single source of truth shared by the Employee Portal, Carrier Integration, Payroll Integration, Notifications, and Reconciliation.

title: Carrier Acceptance Transition — Enrollment Moves to ACTIVE on Carrier Confirmation
description: When the carrier mock API accepts an enrollment transaction, the system shall automatically transition the enrollment status from PENDING_CARRIER to ACTIVE, update the employee portal display, and send an activation notification.
cascadeOnAcceptance: Benefit Summary PDF updated to ACTIVE status version
employeePortalMessage: ✓ Your Benefits Are Active — Your 2027 benefits enrollment has been confirmed by the carrier. Effective Date: January 1, 2027.

title: Carrier Rejection Employee Experience — Plain-Language Explanation with Correction Action
description: If the carrier rejects an enrollment, the employee-facing experience shall show a plain-language explanation of the issue with a clear call-to-action. Technical carrier error codes shall not be displayed directly to employees.

employeeFacingMessage.heading: ⚠ Action Required
employeeFacingMessage.body: Your medical enrollment could not be completed.

audienceSplit.administrator: Technical carrier error code + carrier response + recommended action

title: Benefit Summary PDF — Auto-Generated Personalized Document After Submission
description: The system shall automatically generate a personalized Benefit Summary PDF after enrollment submission. The document includes employer header, employee identity, confirmation number, all elections with coverage tiers and dependents, cost summary, payroll deductions, and enrollment status.
documentSections: Submission date and coverage effective date
Cost summary (monthly employee cost, biweekly payroll deduction, employer contribution)

title: Benefit Summary PDF Versioning — Submitted Version and Active Version
description: The system shall maintain two versions of the Benefit Summary PDF: a Submitted version (labeled PENDING CARRIER CONFIRMATION) generated at enrollment submission, and an Active version (labeled ACTIVE) generated after carrier acceptance. This aligns with the existing document versioning model.

title: Enrollment Submission Confirmation Email — Sent Immediately After Submission
description: The system shall generate a confirmation email after enrollment submission. For the demo, email delivery is simulated via the notification system.

emailTemplate.subject: Your 2027 Benefits Enrollment Has Been Submitted
emailTemplate.body: Your 2027 benefits enrollment has been successfully submitted. Enrollment Confirmation: ENR-2027-10045. Coverage Effective Date: January 1, 2027. Your enrollment is currently pending carrier confirmation.

title: Active Coverage Email — Sent After Carrier Acceptance
description: After carrier acceptance transitions enrollment to ACTIVE, the system shall send an activation confirmation email listing all active benefits and linking to the updated Benefit Summary.

emailTemplate.subject: Your 2027 Benefits Are Active
emailTemplate.body: Your 2027 benefits enrollment has been confirmed. Your coverage is active effective January 1, 2027.

title: Employee Benefits Dashboard — Dynamic Enrollment Status Reflection
description: The Employee Benefits Dashboard shall dynamically reflect the current enrollment status. Before carrier acceptance, benefits show as Pending Confirmation. After carrier acceptance, benefits show as Active with effective date.

title: Enrollment Timeline — Complete Processing History for Employee
description: The employee shall be able to view an enrollment processing timeline showing each completed stage with date. The timeline provides transparency into the enrollment lifecycle without requiring HR contact.

title: AI Post-Enrollment Assistant — Enrollment Status, Elections, and Coverage Questions
description: The AI Benefits Assistant shall be aware of the employee's current enrollment state and be able to answer questions about submission confirmation, election details, carrier status, and coverage effective dates.

exampleInteractions.question: Did my enrollment go through?
exampleInteractions.response: Yes. Your enrollment was submitted successfully on December 15. Your confirmation number is ENR-2027-10045. The carrier accepted your enrollment on December 16, and your coverage is now active effective January 1, 2027.

exampleInteractions.question: What benefits did I choose?
exampleInteractions.response: You selected PPO 500 Medical with Employee + Family coverage, Dental Premium with Employee + Family coverage, and Vision Standard with Employee + Family coverage.

title: Demo Enrollment Centerpiece — Linda White End-to-End Open Enrollment Story
description: The Linda White enrollment story is the primary demo scenario for the enrollment confirmation and post-enrollment experience. The flow demonstrates the complete lifecycle from enrollment wizard to confirmed active coverage.
demoStorySteps: AI Enrollment Assistant helps select PPO 500
Linda asks AI: 'Show me my benefits'
